overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval village at dusk. The character travels from a cobblestone courtyard through a torch-lit brick tunnel, past celebrating villagers, and along a waterfront path into the rural outskirts. The scene features warm sunset lighting mixed with firelight from torches and campfires.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village courtyard with livestock pens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village courtyard toward a large brick archway

notable_agents.action: pigs roaming freely on the cobblestone ground
horse standing on a raised wooden platform

entered.detail: tall stone tower with pointed roof visible in the distance
traditional timber-framed medieval buildings lining the courtyard
large brick tunnel entrance with wooden doors
red brick wall with tiled roof coping
burning fire pit with orange flames

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval village courtyard at dusk, passing pigs and a horse while approaching a large brick archway. The area is lit by warm firelight from a burning pit and the last light of sunset, with timber houses and a distant stone tower framing the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered brick tunnel with torch lighting

events.description: entering the covered brick tunnel through the archway
exiting the tunnel into the outer village area

agents.ego_description: passing through the narrow torch-lit brick tunnel

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms carrying torches walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wall-mounted iron torches with bright orange flames
large wooden portcullis gate partially open

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow brick tunnel illuminated by wall-mounted torches, encountering guards in red uniforms walking in the opposite direction. The space is enclosed with no sky visible, creating a dramatic shift from the open courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outer quarter with market stall and celebrating villagers

events.description: villagers cheer and raise their arms as the character passes by

agents.ego_description: walking past a market stall while villagers celebrate nearby

notable_agents.action: villagers cheering and raising arms in celebration

entered.detail: wooden market stall with orange fabric roof and hanging goods
large stone archway marking the village exit

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens to the outer village quarter where villagers gather near a market stall with an orange canopy. The atmosphere is lively with locals cheering as the character passes through the stone gate toward the countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside path with wooden houses and dock

events.description: exiting the village walls and entering the open waterfront area
natural sunset light becomes dominant as artificial lights fade

agents.ego_description: walking along the lakeside path leaving the village behind

entered.detail: calm lake surface reflecting the sunset sky
wooden pier extending into the water
tall white-barked trees with sparse foliage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the village onto a wide lakeside path, with calm water visible to the left and wooden houses to the right. The lighting shifts to natural sunset backlighting as the artificial village lights fade behind, and birch trees line the route toward the distant stone tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural outskirts with blood stains and farmhouses

events.description: blood stains appear on the dirt path indicating recent violence

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the rural outskirts toward the tower

entered.detail: rustic wooden farm buildings with thatched roofs
dark red blood splattered on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The path continues through rural farmland with simple wooden houses, where ominous blood stains on the ground suggest recent conflict. The lake is no longer visible as the route turns inland, heading directly toward the stone tower silhouetted against the twilight sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling medieval village center through a claustrophobic tunnel and out into a desolate rural landscape at twilight. It begins in an open courtyard filled with livestock and timber houses, moving under the warm glow of a burning pit toward a large brick archway. As the camera enters the narrow brick tunnel, the open sky vanishes and the lighting shifts to the flickering orange of wall-mounted torches while passing guards in red uniforms. The scene then expands as the character exits the tunnel into a lively outer quarter where cheering villagers gather under orange market canopies before passing through a stone gate. Finally, the path opens onto a lakeside route lined with birch trees, where the artificial village lights fade into natural sunset backlighting before the terrain turns inland toward a silhouetted stone tower and blood-stained farmland.
